title: Google and Apple clash with EU over AI assistants, Google ordered to open Android
description: Recent reports indicate Google is facing regulatory actions from the European Union concerning artificial intelligence and its Android operating system.

sources.title: Google and Apple are clashing with the EU over the future of AI assistants
Google Ordered to Give A.I. Rivals More Access on Android Smartphones
It’s official: EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android

sections.heading: EU Regulations on Android and AI
paragraphs: According to Ars Technica, the EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android. The New York Times reports that Google has been ordered to give AI rivals more access on Android smartphones.

sections.heading: Tech Giants and the EU
paragraphs: CNN reports that Google and Apple are clashing with the EU over the future of AI assistants.

sections.heading: Trend Information
paragraphs: This topic is trending in the Singapore region. The trend report indicates a search lower bound of 5,000 and was published on July 19, 2026.

faq.q: What has the EU ordered Google to do regarding Android?
faq.a: According to Ars Technica, the EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android. The New York Times reports that Google has been ordered to give AI rivals more access on Android smartphones.

faq.q: Which companies are reported to be clashing with the EU?
faq.a: According to CNN, Google and Apple are clashing with the EU over the future of AI assistants.
